items.q: The Pacific Ocean borders the east coast of Australia.
items.explanation: This reflects medium-difficulty geography and civics knowledge.

items.q: What is the official currency of China?
Name the currency used in Saudi Arabia.
items.explanation: The national currency of Saudi Arabia is the riyal.

items.q: The euro is used by every country in Europe.
items.explanation: This reflects medium-difficulty geography and civics knowledge.

items.q: Name the currency used in Egypt.
items.explanation: The national currency of Egypt is the Egyptian pound.

items.q: Name the currency used in South Korea.
items.explanation: The national currency of South Korea is the won.

items.q: Name the currency used in European Union.
items.explanation: The national currency of European Union is the euro.

items.q: Name the currency used in Norway.
items.explanation: The national currency of Norway is the krone.

items.q: Name the currency used in Nigeria.
items.explanation: The national currency of Nigeria is the naira.

items.q: Name the currency used in Mexico.
items.explanation: The national currency of Mexico is the peso.
